title: myosotis stricta subsp. speluncicola
intro: Myosotis stricta subsp. speluncicola, also known as cave forget-me-not, is a rare subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of M. stricta subsp. speluncicola include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support overall health and well-being.
